Session 1 	Session 2
In this video, Tanner is going to walk you through the entire process of creating an event in the Mindmint software. Where this may have seemed
complicated before, Tanner is going to show you just how simple it is with the Mindmint software!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Login to the Mindmint software. (**And keep in mind all of what you are about to do CAN be changed and adjusted at a later date!)
Go to the same event we built your agenda in.
Click "Event Builder" at the top.
Complete "Stage 1" tasks.
Complete "Stage 2" tasks.
Complete "Stage 3" tasks.
Complete "Stage 4" tasks.
Complete "Stage 5" tasks.
Finalize your agenda.
